nl_query: Show all scripts where the scan was performed by a scanner device registered at a campus different from the campus where the exam was scheduled, indicating a potential logistics or data entry error.
failed_sql:
SELECT asa.script_id, asa.evaluator_id, asa.assigned_by, asa.assigned_at, asa.assignment_type, asa.attempt_type, asa.section_id, asa.status, asa.total_marks, asa.frozen_at, asa.submitted_at, asa.archived_at, asa.is_active, asa.version, asa.created_at, asa.updated_at, sd.device_id, sd.device_name, sd.registered_at, au.code AS campus_code, au.name AS campus_name, esc.exam_id, esc.exam_date, esc.exam_type, esc.campus_id, esc.academic_year, esc.synced_at, au2.code AS campus_code2, au2.name AS campus_name2
FROM   script_assignment asa
JOIN   scanner_device sd ON sd.id = asa.device_id
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id = sd.campus_id
JOIN   exam_schedule_cache esc ON esc.exam_id = asa.exam_id
JOIN   academic_unit au2 ON au2.id = esc.campus_id
WHERE  sd.registered_at <> esc.campus_id
  AND  asa.assignment_type = 'AUTO'
  AND  asa.status = 'SCANNED'
  AND  asa.is_active = TRUE
ORDER  BY asa.assigned_at DESC
LIMIT  1000;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): script_assignment.status, script_assignment.total_marks, script_assignment.frozen_at, script_assignment.submitted_at, script_assignment.archived_at. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
